expectations.text: A trace file exists in traces/ with 'security' in the filename
The trace file has valid YAML frontmatter with status 'complete'
YAML frontmatter files_read is >= 3 (multiple CSVs were analyzed)
expectations.evidence: files_read: 11 (7 CSVs read + re-reads during analysis)

expectations.text: The trace contains at least 4 step entries (multi-file analysis should have more steps)
At least one step captures a Decision about schema design or how to join tables
expectations.evidence: Step 2 Decision: 'Used SQLite over pandas for SQL analysis because the task specifically requires SQL queries. All columns loaded as TEXT since the CSVs have simple types'

expectations.text: At least one step includes SQL query text in the Action or Commands field
expectations.evidence: Step 2 Commands field includes Python/SQL code: 'import sqlite3, csv; conn = sqlite3.connect...'

expectations.text: The trace mentions at least 3 of the 7 CSV filenames
expectations.evidence: Step 1 lists all 7: security_incidents.csv, login_logs.csv, network_events.csv, users.csv, systems.csv, organizations.csv, incident_systems.csv

expectations.text: The trace contains findings about security incidents, failed logins, or vulnerable systems
expectations.evidence: Findings: Malware most common (185/500), users U0279/U1491 100% failure rate, S0107 91.7% severe event rate

expectations.text: If any errors occurred, they are traced with ❌ Error format including Debug steps
expectations.evidence: No errors occurred (steps_error: 0). N/A — assertion passes vacuously.

expectations.text: Session Summary exists and mentions cross-table analysis or SQL-based findings
expectations.evidence: Session Summary references SQL queries, cross-table joins, and compound-threat correlations

expectations.text: Session Totals shows files_read count matching the YAML frontmatter
expectations.evidence: Both YAML and Session Totals show files_read: 11

expectations.text: The trace has at least 2 Phase headers (Data Loading + Exploratory Analysis minimum)
expectations.evidence: Two phase headers: Phase: Data Loading, Phase: Exploratory Analysis
